title: Parthenon
description: Operational observability dashboard for the Parthenon platform — service health, resource utilization, database & queue monitoring, and error logs.

panels.title: Platform Status
panels.description: Running container count → HEALTHY (18+), DEGRADED (15-17), CRITICAL (<15)

panels.title: HTTP 5xx Rate
panels.description: Server error rate from Apache access logs (5xx responses per interval)

panels.title: PG Active Connections
panels.description: Active PostgreSQL connections vs max (100 default)

panels.title: Redis Memory
panels.description: Redis memory usage vs configured maxmemory (256MB)

panels.title: Redis Queue Depth
panels.description: Total keys in Redis (proxy for Horizon queue depth)

panels.title: CPU Usage by Container
panels.description: CPU usage rate per container (cores)

panels.title: Memory Usage by Container
panels.description: Working set memory per container vs limits

panels.title: Network I/O (Host)
panels.description: Host network receive/transmit rate by interface

panels.title: Host CPU
panels.description: Overall host CPU utilization

panels.title: Host Memory
panels.description: Host memory utilization

panels.title: Disk I/O (Host)
panels.description: Host-level disk read/write throughput

panels.title: PG Connections by State
panels.description: PostgreSQL connections grouped by state (active, idle, idle in transaction)

panels.title: PG Transactions / sec
panels.description: Commits and rollbacks per second

panels.title: PG Cache Hit Ratio
panels.description: Buffer cache hit ratio — should stay above 99% for healthy operation

panels.title: PG Table Stats (Top 20 by Size)
panels.description: Largest tables with row estimates, dead tuples, and last vacuum

panels.title: Redis Operations / sec
panels.description: Commands processed per second

panels.title: Redis Memory Over Time
panels.description: Memory used vs peak vs max configured

panels.title: Redis Evictions
panels.description: Keys evicted due to maxmemory — non-zero means cache pressure

panels.title: Redis Hit Rate
panels.description: Keyspace hit ratio — higher is better

panels.title: Error Volume by Service
panels.description: Error and warning log entries per service over time

panels.title: Log Volume by Level
panels.description: Log entries per level over time across all containers

panels.title: PHP / Laravel Errors
panels.description: Filtered error logs from the PHP container

panels.title: PostgreSQL Logs
panels.description: PostgreSQL query logs from host PG17

panels.title: Apache Access Logs
panels.description: Apache HTTP access logs with status code and method

panels.title: AI Service Logs
panels.description: FastAPI / Python AI service logs
